text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: I apologize for incurring such an injury...

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
However, it is not severe enough to warrant
changes to the schedule.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
With a little time to rest, I should be able to
resume training as planned.
choice_data_list: Don't worry and just rest up for now.
Are you sure you can continue?
Are you sure you can continue?

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
With a little time to rest, I should be able to
resume training as planned.
choice_data_list: Don't worry and just rest up for now.
Are you sure you can continue?
Are you sure you can continue?

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
If I do that, we'll end up delaying the schedule,
though...
choice_data_list:
And if your injury worsens, you'll lose all your
progress.

And if your injury worsens, you'll lose all your
progress.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Apologies. The pressure seems to be getting to
me. I will focus on recovery for now...

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: I just hope we can get back on track afterwards...

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: Yes. Light running should not be an issue.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: That was more painful than I expected.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: I must practice more, and yet...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I warn Eishin Flash not to push herself and give
her a time-out to recover.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: ...Hm, this level of discomfort seems manageable.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Let's create a new schedule that accommodates
for my injury right away.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And like that, we get Eishin Flash back on a
training regimen that isn't too strenuous.
